dialogs.period_closed_create_msg: Cannot create assignments in closed periods.
dialogs.period_closed_edit_msg: Period closed. Actual value can only be edited with special permissions.
dialogs.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this assignment?
dialogs.confirm_close_msg: Close this KPI for the period? Edits on this assignment will be blocked.
dialogs.confirm_reopen_msg: Reopen this KPI? It will become editable again.

banner.all_subperiods_ok: ✅ All overdue sub-periods have a loaded value.
banner.totals_header: Totals to date for growth/reduction KPIs:

empty.no_filters_subtitle: You can search by period, collaborator, KPI, area, or role using the filters above.
empty.no_results_subtitle: Adjust period, area, role, or search to find matching assignments.
empty.no_assignments_title: No assignments for the current selection
empty.no_assignments_subtitle: The selected combination has no assignments registered yet.
empty.no_assignments_hint: To create assignments you need: ✓ Loaded collaborators ✓ Defined KPIs ✓ An active period

api_errors.close_forbidden: You do not have permission to close this assignment.
api_errors.reopen_forbidden: You do not have permission to reopen this assignment.

close_grid_modal.title: Close Grid
close_grid_modal.warning_title: Are you sure you want to close this grid?
close_grid_modal.warning_body: Once closed, it cannot be edited unless an administrator or director reopens it.

generate_grid_modal.title: Generate Base Grids
generate_grid_modal.scope_hint: Grids will be generated for all collaborators in this scope.
generate_grid_modal.available_kpis_hint: Available system KPIs are listed here.
generate_grid_modal.kpis_required: You must select at least one KPI
generate_grid_modal.default_target_hint: If omitted, 0 will be used as the initial value.
generate_grid_modal.default_weight_hint: If omitted, it will be distributed evenly.
generate_grid_modal.success_message:
Base grids generated successfully.
Assignments created: {{created}} - Collaborators: {{collaborators}} - KPIs: {{kpis}}
generate_grid_modal.error_default: Could not generate base grids. Check the submitted data.

form.subtitle: Fill in order: Scope → Collaborator → KPI → Target.
form.period_closed_create: Cannot create new assignments in closed periods.
form.period_closed_edit: Only the actual value (actual) can be updated.
form.assignment_closed_hint: This assignment is closed. Only admins and directors can reopen it.
form.collaborator_hint: Select a collaborator from the scope.
form.kpi_hint: KPIs apply per assignment, not per area.
form.subperiod_empty: No sub-period — use Monthly Plan for all months
form.subperiod_hint_empty: Leave empty if you want to define targets month by month in the Monthly Plan (available below once you choose collaborator and KPI).
form.subperiod_hint_selected: Assignment for a specific month. For other months you can create individual assignments or use the Monthly Plan in the summary assignment.
form.weight_no_scope: No weighting defined for this KPI in the selected scope. Define it in KPIs for automatic preloading.
form.weight_preloaded: Weighting preloaded from KPI by scope.
form.plan_helper: Set the target for each month. Save the plan before closing the form.
form.input_mode_hint: Every KPI starts as manual. Automation replaces the load, not the KPI.
form.criteria_prefilled_hint: Copied from the macro KPI. You can edit it if the source changes.
form.curator_hint: Assigned by role, not by person.
form.actual_placeholder: Enter the achieved value this month
form.actual_hint_negative: This KPI allows negative actual values. Target and weighting are not edited on update.
form.actual_hint_normal: Update the achieved value month by month here. Target and weighting are not edited on update.
form.dialog_close_kpi: Close this KPI? Edits will be blocked.
form.dialog_reopen_kpi: Reopen this KPI? It will become editable again.
form.error_no_period: Cannot create assignments in closed periods
form.error_weight_sum: Total weighting would be {{value}}%. Maximum is 100%
form.error_actual_negative: This KPI does not allow negative actual values

api_errors.plan_identifiers_required: Missing data to save the monthly plan.
api_errors.plan_config_forbidden: You do not have permission to edit the monthly plan.
api_errors.plan_items_required: You must send at least one sub-period to save the plan.
api_errors.plan_weight_override_invalid: The override weight must be between 0 and 100.

bulk.title: Bulk KPI Assignment
bulk.step1_subtitle: Step 1: configure the KPI to assign
bulk.weight_hint: KPI weight in the collaborator's total
bulk.advanced_toggle: Apply optional advanced configuration to all assignments
bulk.advanced_hint: Allows defining status, curation, input mode and criteria without editing each one later.
bulk.empty: No active collaborators with the selected filters.

review.hint_reject: It is recommended to explain the rejection so the collaborator can correct it

propose.title: Propose Values
propose.actual_hint: This value will be proposed for review by your manager
propose.comments_placeholder: Add comments about this proposed value...
propose.comments_hint: Explain the context or reasons for this proposed value
propose.reason_placeholder: Detail why an override is being proposed
propose.error_default: Error proposing values. Check that the period is not closed.

outlier_messages.high: Unusually {{direction}} the historical average ({{deviation}}% deviation vs. mean {{mean}} across {{sample}}). Review whether the data is correct before submitting.
outlier_messages.medium: Value outside the usual range ({{deviation}}% {{direction}} the mean {{mean}} across {{sample}}). Consider adding an explanatory comment.
outlier_messages.low: Value slightly away from the historical pattern ({{deviation}}% {{direction}} the mean {{mean}} across {{sample}}).

messages.weight_sum: The total weight is {{total}}% (it must be 100%)
messages.macro_kpi_missing: KPI "{{kpi}}" is linked to macro KPI "{{macro}}", but it is not assigned
messages.unlinked_kpis_one: {{count}} KPI is not linked to the objective tree
messages.unlinked_kpis_other: {{count}} KPIs are not linked to the objective tree
messages.kpi_saturation: The collaborator has {{count}} assigned KPIs (recommended maximum: {{max}})

copy_scope_modal.title: Copy group KPI
copy_scope_modal.empty: There are no other available targets of the same type.

reasons.target_missing: The target scope does not exist
reasons.type_mismatch: The target is not the same type as the source
reasons.already_exists: A group KPI with that combination already exists
